name: tdm-features
description: Diagnostics, completion and hover for TDM Gherkin feature files, powered by `tdm lsp` and the exported tdm.model.json entity model.

tdm.toolPath.description: Path to the tdm executable (the dotnet tool). The language server is launched as `<toolPath> lsp`.

tdm.modelPath.description: Workspace-relative path to the exported entity model (see `tdm export-model`).
